_source: 6.3 CAPABILITY POINT EXPENDITURE SUMMARY (Charts & Tables Common to Both Players)
_note: Transcribed verbatim from the 6.3 chart. The combat engine wires the assault/defend and break-contact/disengage rows; the probe and undergo-barrage rows are transcribed for the record but not yet consumed (the engine does not model a distinct Probe). Terrain/minefield (TEC/CPA formulae), detach/attach, load/unload, construction, paradrop and air-readiness rows are out of scope here -- movement already charges its own CP via UNIT_MOVED.cp_spent.
